tasks: From the fig1_any_app_effects.pdf plot, report the mean effect of cross-party interaction on an anonymous chat platform on Depolarization Index. Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
From the fig3_party_effects.pdf plot results, is the depolarization effect larger for Republicans than Democrats? Only report Yes or No.
From the fig2_label_condition_effects.pdf plot results, what is the point estimate for the Incorrect Labels group on the Issue Index? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
From the fig3_party_effects.pdf plot results, is the effect on Affect Index statistically significant for Democrats? Report only Yes or No.
From fig3_party_effects.pdf results, what is the CACE estimate for Issue Index for Republicans? Only report the number rounded to three decimal places.
